intentSynonyms: show me my folder entries in lucid
view my folder entries in lucid
see all my folder entries in lucid
list folders and document entries in lucid
description: List folder entries for the current user. Includes both folders and document entries. Optionally filter by parent folder to list children of a specific folder.

parent_id.description: Parent folder entry ID to list children of. Omit for root-level entries.
